title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Presets Without Stripe — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria with a passion for selling presets, but your dreams are constantly thwarted by PayPal and Stripe's strict country restrictions. You've tried to work around these platforms, but their limitations have left you frustrated and financially stuck. You've missed out on potential sales, and your income has suffered as a result. It's time to break free from these constraints and explore alternative payment solutions that cater to your needs. In this article, we'll delve into the world of crypto-native infrastructure and explore the real differences between your choices for selling presets without Stripe – no PayPal required.
What Each Option Actually Offers

When it comes to selling presets without Stripe, you have two primary options: Gumroad and Payhip. However, both of these platforms come with limitations. Gumroad, for instance, charges a 3.5% + 30¢ per sale, and Payhip charges 2.9% + 30¢ per sale. On the other hand, you can use a crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, which allows you to accept payments directly from customers without any intermediaries. This means you'll save on fees and have more control over your transactions. Another option is to use a payment processor like NOWPayments, which offers a flat 0.5% + 10¢ per sale fee, but you'll need to provide your own payment gateway. Each option has its pros and cons, and it's essential to understand what you're getting into before making a decision.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to handling restricted countries, PayPal and Stripe are notoriously strict. They have a blacklist of countries that are not allowed to use their services, and Nigeria is unfortunately one of them. This means that even if you have a PayPal or Stripe account, you won't be able to use it to sell presets to customers in your home country. Gumroad and Payhip have similar restrictions, and they may not allow you to sell to customers in restricted countries either. In contrast, crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect is designed to work with any country, including Nigeria. This means you'll be able to sell your presets to customers worldwide without any restrictions.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, PayPal and Stripe are not the best options. They both charge a transaction fee, which can range from 2.9% + 30¢ to 3.5% + 30¢ per sale, depending on the type of payment method used. Gumroad and Payhip have similar fees, and you'll also need to pay a payment processor fee, which can add up quickly. In contrast, crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect charges a flat 0.5% + 10¢ per sale fee, which is significantly lower than the fees charged by PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip. This means you'll save more money on each sale and have more control over your transactions.
PayPal's geographic exclusion is not a bug — it is a deliberate infrastructure decision that will not change.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

When it comes to automation and delivery capabilities, crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect has a clear advantage. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can automate your delivery process, which means you'll be able to send your presets to customers instantly after payment is received. You'll also be able to track your sales and customer interactions in real-time, which will help you improve your sales and marketing efforts. In contrast, PayPal and Stripe require manual intervention for each sale, which can be time-consuming and prone to errors. Gumroad and Payhip have some automation features, but they're not as robust as those offered by Web3 Wallet Connect.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which option should you choose based on your situation? If you're looking for a simple, low-fee solution that allows you to sell presets to customers worldwide, then crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect is the best choice. If you're already using Gumroad or Payhip, you may want to consider switching to a more cost-effective and flexible solution like Web3 Wallet Connect. However, if you're happy with your current payment processor and don't mind the associated fees, then you can stick with what you know.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The most common question I get from creators in Nigeria is 'Can I still use PayPal or Stripe even if they're not allowed to operate in my country?' Unfortunately, the answer is no. Both PayPal and Stripe have strict country restrictions, and Nigeria is unfortunately one of them. However, there are alternative payment solutions available that can help you get paid for your presets without any restrictions. Crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect is one such solution that allows you to accept payments directly from customers without any intermediaries.
Crypto-native infrastructure means no single platform decision can cut off your income.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're interested in learning more about crypto-native infrastructure and how it can help you sell presets to customers worldwide, then check out Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect. This platform allows you to accept payments directly from customers without any intermediaries, which means you'll save on fees and have more control over your transactions. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you'll be able to automate your delivery process, track your sales and customer interactions in real-time, and improve your sales and marketing efforts. Whether you're a seasoned creator or just starting out, Web3 Wallet Connect is a game-changer for anyone looking to sell presets online.
Your Action Checklist

Start by accepting that no PayPal or Stripe workaround is durable — the platforms actively close gaps as they discover them. Create a NOWPayments account and configure wallet addresses for USDT on Tron and Bitcoin as your primary coins. Purchase and deploy the Core Shop Engine — it handles payment verification and automated delivery. Configure the Web3 Wallet Connect module with your product details and checkout settings. Upload your digital product files to your delivery server with the paths configured in the engine. Test the complete flow with a real mainnet transaction — send a small amount to your wallet and confirm the webhook fires and the delivery email arrives. Check the Admin Dashboard to confirm the transaction appears in the log. Add your store URL to your social profiles and content channels. You now have infrastructure that no payment platform can take from you.
The store that runs on a wallet and a webhook cannot be suspended by anyone else's compliance team.
